title: Kennebec County Registry of Deeds

items.title: Page updated: Kennebec County Registry of Deeds
items.content_text:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.

What changed (text excerpt):
Added:
  + Registry of Deeds
  + The Kennebec County Registry of Deeds has proudly served our community since 1799, safeguarding the essential property records that form the foundation of real estate ownership.
  + As required by Maine law, the Registry meticulously maintains and preserves all recorded documents and plans from historical deeds dating back over 200 years to today’s modern transactions.
  + Our office provides prompt, professional, and courteous service to the public, making vital records such as mortgages, deeds, liens, and plans easily accessible. Every document is carefully preserved for the permanent record.
  + Records are available for convenient public search both online and in our office, supporting homeowners, real estate professionals, title companies, and businesses throughout Kennebec County.
  + The Registry is led by Register of Deeds Matthew Boucher, with dedicated support from Deputy Register Sue Lapointe and a committed team.
  + Whether you’re researching property history, closing a real estate transaction, or ensuring clear title, the Kennebec County Registry of Deeds stands ready to serve you with accuracy, efficiency, and a strong commitment to customer service.
  + Property Alert
  + SIGN UP NOW
  + Search
  + Public Records
Removed:
  - Click here to search
  - public records
  - Click here to sign up for property alert
  - Matthew Boucher
  - Register of Deeds
